chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-7053 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.29772/2022. 2. For orders on Misc. No.29773/2022. 3. For orders as to maintainability. 21.11.2022. Petitioner is present in person. -------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner professes to have come forward in the public interest, seeking that Applications on the ground of Contempt of Court ought to be allowed to be brought against public officials by any person as stand-alone cases rather than as miscellaneous applications within the context of particular cases by a party to that lis. Having heard the Petitioner and perused the Petition, we are of the view that no case of public interest stands made out and no question of fundamental rights otherwise arises for consideration. Under the given circumstances, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived and while granting the application for urgency we accordingly dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous application. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE MUBASHIR
